game_info.title: ULTRAKILL-LITE
game_info.concept:
ULTRAKILL is a fast-paced ultraviolent retro FPS combining the skill-based style scoring from character action games with unadulterated carnage inspired by the best shooters of the '90s. Rip apart your foes with varied destructive weapons and shower in their blood to regain your health. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1229490/ULTRAKILL/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ ULTRAKILL is a fast-paced ultraviolent retro FPS combining the skill-based style scoring from character action games with unadulterated carnage inspired by the best shooters of the '90s. Rip apart your foes with varied destructive weapons and shower in their blood to regain your health.

ULTRAKILL is a fast-paced ultraviolent old school FPS that fuses together classic shooters like Quake, modern shooters like Doom (2016) and character action games like Devil May Cry.

Mankind has gone extinct and the only beings left on earth are machines fueled by blood.
But now that blood is starting to run out on the surface...
Machines are racing to the depths of Hell in search of more.



  • Use your many movement abilities to stay mobile and avoid the relentless attacks of the dead, demons and other machines.
  • Destroy them with an arsenal of incredibly powerful weapons, each with multiple available variations.
  • Soak yourself in their blood to regain health and keep fighting.



  • Kill fast and with SSStyle to rack up combos and gain points that can be used on weapon variations between missions.
  • Master the many levels to achieve high ranks and take on unique optional challenges.
  • Explore the varied and unique campaign environments inspired by Dante's Inferno to find plentiful hidden secrets
game_info.description:
ULTRAKILL-LITE is a high-octane, retro-styled First Person Shooter where blood is fuel. You are a machine descending into a geometric hell. The only way to regain health is to shower in the fresh blood of your enemies. Master movement mechanics like dashing and jumping to survive waves of hostile entities. Build your Style Rank by performing skillful kills and moving with flow.

The arena is procedural. Survive as long as you can, or eliminate all enemies to progress.
game_info.controls:
- W, A, S, D: Move Forward, Left, Backward, Right
- Arrow Keys: Look / Aim Camera
- Space: Jump
- Shift: Dash (Directional)
- Z: Fire Weapon
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart (when Game Over)
- Enter: Start Game

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement physics and collision with the ground.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate pressing the 'W' key to move forward and 'Space' to jump. Monitor the player's position to ensure Y value changes (jump) and returns to ground level (gravity/collision), and Z value changes (movement).
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position updates according to velocity. Gravity pulls player down. Ground collision prevents falling endlessly.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement physics and collision with the ground.

TEST_1.expected: Player position updates according to velocity. Gravity pulls player down. Ground collision prevents falling endlessly.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify weapon firing and projectile/hitscan mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check if a projectile or hitscan event is generated. Check if ammunition reduces (if applicable) or cooldown triggers.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Weapon fires, visual effects (particles/recoil) trigger. If an enemy is in front (simulated), they take damage.
TEST_2.description: Verify weapon firing and projectile/hitscan mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy: Simulate pressing 'Z'. Check if a projectile or hitscan event is generated. Check if ammunition reduces (if applicable) or cooldown triggers.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify enemy AI tracking and damage dealing.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Spawn an enemy. Do not move the player. Allow the enemy to enter chase state. Monitor player health.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Enemy moves towards player coordinates. Upon reaching range, player health decreases.
TEST_3.description: Verify enemy AI tracking and damage dealing.

TEST_3.expected: Enemy moves towards player coordinates. Upon reaching range, player health decreases.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Set player health to low. Spawn an enemy nearby. Simulate killing the enemy at close range to spawn blood particles.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player health increases when blood particles collide with the player hitbox.

TEST_4.expected: Player health increases when blood particles collide with the player hitbox.

TEST_5.test_description: Verify Game Over state on death.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Set player health to 0 manually. Check `gameState.gamePhase`.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game phase transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE". Inputs for movement stop working.
TEST_5.description: Verify Game Over state on death.
TEST_5.strategy: Set player health to 0 manually. Check `gameState.gamePhase`.
TEST_5.expected: Game phase transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE". Inputs for movement stop working.
